description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline for an R package using the jozefhajnala/rdev:3.4.4 Docker image (and the jozefhajnala/rhub:rbase image for rhub checks) with a global before_script that runs apt-get update and defines the variables CODECOV_TOKEN, _R_CHECK_CRAN_INCOMING_, and _R_CHECK_FORCE_SUGGESTS_. Define the stages build, document, check, test, deploy, and checkrhub. In the build stage add a buildbinary job that runs `r -e 'devtools::build(binary = TRUE)'`. In the checkrhub stage add check_macos and check_mswin jobs (image jozefhajnala/rhub:rbase) that run `Rscript inst/rhubcheck.R "macos-highsierra-release-cran"` and `Rscript inst/rhubcheck.R "windows-x86_64-devel"` respectively; in the check stage add checkerrors, checknotes, and checkwarnings jobs (image jozefhajnala/rdev:3.4.4) that each run an `r -e` command to fail on errors, notes, or warnings from `devtools::check(document = FALSE, args = "--no-tests")`. In the test stage add unittests (runs `r -e 'if (any(as.data.frame(devtools::test())[["failed"]] > 0)) stop("Some tests failed.")'`) and codecov (runs `r -e 'covr::codecov()'`); in the document stage add a documentation job that runs `r inst/ci/document.R`; and in the deploy stage add an install job that runs `r -e 'devtools::install()'`. No artifacts, caches, or conditional rules are specified.
